hunt.offer: AI automation & AI services for small businesses
hunt.source: Live web research — search + site reads

prospects.name: Mike Watkins
prospects.title: President & Founder
prospects.reason: Bullseye — owns the agency, preaches ROI/SQLs over vanity metrics. Already sells accountability; AI is a natural force-multiplier for him.
prospects._hook: preaches ROI over vanity metrics — 1M+ leads generated
signals: Site pitches 'real SQLs & close-rates, not impressions' — values measurable ROI
Claims 1M+ leads generated — runs at volume, feels reporting pain
HubSpot-certified partner — already invests in marketing tooling
prospects.lifeEvent: Site emphasizes ROI accountability over vanity metrics (1M+ leads generated)

outreach.angle: He already sells accountability over impressions. Position AI as scaling his lead-gen + client reporting without adding headcount.
outreach.opener: Hey Mike — saw ADTACK pitches real SQLs and close-rates over vanity metrics. I help agencies like yours automate reporting + lead qualification with AI so your team spends time on strategy, not spreadsheets. Worth 10 minutes?
outreach.dm: Mike — genuinely respect that ADTACK leads with ROI, not impressions. I help agencies bolt AI onto exactly that. Cool if I send one idea?
outreach.voicemail: Hi Mike, it's {you} — quick one about ADTACK's reporting workflow. I'll text so it's not another voicemail. Talk soon.

followups.text: Call: opener above. Reference the 'real SQLs over vanity metrics' line from their site.
Email: 1 example of an agency that cut reporting time 60% with AI. No ask.
Soft nudge: 'Should I close your file or is timing just off?'

prospects.name: Twenty8 Marketing
prospects.title: Ask for: Owner / Marketing Lead
prospects.reason: Strong fit — specializes in Google Maps 'Pack 3' local SEO for service businesses; AI can scale their audits and client outreach.
prospects._hook: specializes in Google Maps Pack-3 local SEO
signals: Verified email on site (Hello@twenty8marketing.com) — easy to reach
Niche: Google Maps Pack-3 ranking for local service businesses
Located 9550 S Eastern Ave — established office
prospects.lifeEvent: Specializes in 'Pack 3' Google Maps optimization for Las Vegas Valley service businesses

outreach.angle: They sell local-SEO results. AI can automate their audits, review-response, and reporting so they handle more clients per head.
outreach.opener: Hi — saw Twenty8 specializes in getting local businesses into the Google Maps top 3. I help agencies automate the audit + review-response grind with AI so you can take on more clients without more staff. Worth a quick look?
outreach.dm: Love the Pack-3 focus at Twenty8. I help local-SEO agencies automate the repetitive parts with AI — can I send one idea?
outreach.voicemail: Hi, it's {you} — quick one about scaling Twenty8's local-SEO ops with AI. I'll email the details. Thanks!

followups.text: Send a 60-sec Loom auditing a sample GMB with AI.
Nudge + offer a free pilot audit.

prospects.name: Robertson + Partners
prospects.title: Ask for: Founder / Principal
prospects.reason: Strong fit — creative-led agency ('ideas worth advertising'); AI removes production grunt-work so the team stays on ideas.
prospects._hook: philosophy: 'less advertising, more ideas worth advertising'
signals: Office at 6061 S Fort Apache Rd — established
prospects.lifeEvent: Brand philosophy: 'the world needs less advertising and more ideas worth advertising'

outreach.angle: They value ideas over volume. Pitch AI as handling the grunt work (research, first drafts, production) so their people spend more time on the ideas.
outreach.opener: Hi — Robertson + Partners' 'ideas worth advertising' line stuck with me. I help creative shops use AI for the grunt work (research, first drafts, versioning) so your team stays on the ideas. Worth 10 minutes?
outreach.dm: That 'ideas worth advertising' philosophy is great. I help creative agencies free up time with AI for exactly that — can I share one idea?
outreach.voicemail: Hi, it's {you} — quick one about freeing your creatives from grunt work with AI. I'll email details.

followups.text: Share a creative-agency AI workflow example.

prospects.name: Noble Studios
prospects.title: Ask for: Founder / Managing Director
prospects.reason: Solid fit — established brand+digital studio with a Vegas office; good candidate for AI-augmented production and analytics.

signals: Downtown office at 818 Stewart Ave — established presence
Brand + digital full-service — multiple AI insertion points
prospects.lifeEvent: Maintains a Las Vegas office (818 Stewart Ave) plus other markets — multi-location agency

outreach.angle: Multi-service studio = lots of repetitive production. Pitch AI for content production speed + analytics.
outreach.opener: Hey — saw Noble Studios runs brand + digital out of your Stewart Ave office. I help studios speed up content production and reporting with AI without losing craft. Worth 10 minutes?
outreach.dm: Noble's brand + digital work is sharp. I help studios add AI to production without losing quality — can I send one idea?
outreach.voicemail: Hi, it's {you} — quick one about AI-assisted production for Noble. I'll follow with an email.

prospects.name: Thrive Agency (Las Vegas)

signals: Multi-market delivery — automation scales across teams
prospects.lifeEvent: Runs full-service SEO/PPC/web/social — high-volume delivery shop

outreach.angle: Volume delivery shop — AI for reporting, audits, and content drafts saves real labor.
outreach.opener: Hi — Thrive's full-service delivery is exactly where AI saves the most labor (reporting, audits, drafts). I help agencies automate the repetitive 30%. Worth a look?
outreach.dm: Thrive's full-service model is perfect for AI on the repetitive work — can I send an idea?
outreach.voicemail: Hi, it's {you} — quick one about cutting Thrive's reporting/audit labor with AI. Emailing details.

prospects.name: Vegas Marketing
prospects.title: Ask for: Owner
prospects.reason: Solid fit — local SEO/web shop; warm them up, then pitch AI for audits and content.
prospects._hook: positions as Vegas' #1 SEO & web design shop
signals: SEO + web design focus — clear AI automation fit
Local Vegas shop — owner-operated, fast decisions
prospects.lifeEvent: Positions itself as Las Vegas' #1 SEO & digital marketing agency

outreach.angle: Owner-operated SEO shop — fast decisions. Lead with a free AI audit of one of their client sites.
outreach.opener: Hey — saw Vegas Marketing does SEO + web design. I help local shops use AI to run audits and content faster. Happy to run a free AI audit on one of your sites — worth 10 minutes?
outreach.dm: Vegas Marketing's SEO work looks solid — I help shops like yours speed it up with AI. Can I send a free sample audit?
outreach.voicemail: Hi, it's {you} — quick one, I'll run a free AI audit for Vegas Marketing. Texting you.
